notes: Batch-F: 44 entries from app/src/ai/agent/mod.rs (AI Agent root module). Breakdown: 19 translated (clipboard format_for_copy paths + UI error messages with dual occurrences in render_failed_output/web_fetch.rs + CurrentHead::title + CloneRepositoryURL::query + AIAgentInput::user_query for CodeReview), 25 flagged telemetry_payload (Display impls only reached via println! in conversation.rs:2173 debug output — Display for AIAgentInput / Display for AIAgentOutputMessage / Display for CancellationReason / Display for FinishedAIAgentOutput / Display for AIAgentOutput — none of which have UI consumers in production code; format_for_copy uses individual variant Display impls directly, not the message-level Display). Notable: 'Warp is currently overloaded' and 'Internal Warp error' translated because they have additional literal occurrences in app/src/ai/blocklist/block/view_impl/common.rs which are user-visible in render_failed_output; 'Fetching/Fetched N web pages' translated because they appear in web_fetch.rs UI rendering. Glossary: Agent/Warp/MCP/AWS preserved; subagent → 子 Agent; denylist → 拒绝列表; AWS Bedrock credentials → AWS Bedrock 凭据; quota → 配额; context window → 上下文窗口.
